/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/TaskEditGraph_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/connectionitem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/taskconditiondialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/taskgraphscene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/taskgraphview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/taskmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskEditGraph.dir/src/tasknodeitem.cpp.o -o TaskEditGraph  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
